notes:
Batch B (61 entries) — AI command blocks, inline-actions, agent startup, AWS credentials.

Decisions:
- 59 entries translated as UI strings (StartAgentOutcome::Error / StartAgentResult::Error / Text widget / Button / Toast / status bar / inline-action render).
- 1 panic flag: requested_command.rs:116 `.expect("CMD_ENTER_ACCEPT_REQUESTED_COMMAND_KEYSTROKE is invalid")` → panic_message.
- 1 protocol_key flag: block.rs:2728 `text.text().contains("The matrix theme is now available at")` — this is a marker string matched against agent-generated output (LLM emits this English text). Translating breaks the match. Tagged protocol_key.

Notes:
- crates/ai/src/aws_credentials.rs entries all flow through `user_facing_components(&self) -> (String, String, Icon)` — clearly UI; translated all 10.
- Glossary applied: Agent (keep English), MCP (keep), Warp (keep), AWS (keep), GitHub (keep), Oz (keep — orchestration internal codename per glossary 'orchestration' note still references 'Oz' identifier; here it's a UI label so 'Oz' literal preserved), code review → 代码审查, profile → 配置文件 (consistent with prior batches), credentials → 凭证, harness → 执行环境 (glossary), credit→? (n/a).
- ASCII ... → …… for 'Refreshing credentials...' → '正在刷新凭证……'.
- Trailing space on 'Missing GitHub authentication. ' preserved in target.
- Placeholders {name}, {total}, {answered_count}, {primary}, {harness_name}, {display_input}, positional {} all preserved with exact arity.
- Quoted strings around %s-style placeholders use Chinese curly quotes “…” (full-width) per project convention for emphasis.
- 'Warping with X' translated as 'Warp 加速' (verb form for Warp's branded execution speedup).
- 'Setting up environment' rendered as shimmering text — kept short for shimmer UX.
- 'Open in code review' / 'Open all in code review' — code review per glossary → 代码审查.
- Counts: 59 translate + 1 panic + 1 protocol_key = 61. subflag keys (2) match null-target ids (2). 0 bilingual ids.
